description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a detached swimming pool. The house features large windows, especially along one side, suggesting a sunroom or enclosed patio area. The exterior is primarily white with some accent colors visible in the interior rooms, such as pink and brown. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible interior furnishings, and a clear main entryway. The pool is rectangular with a rounded edge, positioned separately from the main building. The overall design is open and contemporary, with an emphasis on natural light and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a detached swimming pool, featuring a bright white exterior and open layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade of the house with several windows and the detached swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sunroom or enclosed patio with large glass windows and the pool to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a clear view of the house's internal layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bedrooms and bathrooms, with the pool positioned to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and clean modern lines
